title: Notifications: Email + Telegram + In-App WebSocket
pre_check: read_file backend/app/core/config.py  # check MAIL_*, TELEGRAM_* vars
description: Notification system: Order status change -> Celery chord -> parallel Email + Telegram + In-App push. In-App via WebSocket reusing IoT ConnectionManager.

email_templates.note: All inherit base.html. CSS inlined via premailer (Gmail compat).

inapp_model_check.must_have: id, user_id, title, body, link(nullable), is_read(default=False), created_at

telegram.note: If TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not set — skip silently, no exception

sms: smsc.ru — stub only, SMSC_LOGIN intentionally empty
contracts: NEVER log author_email or any personal data (152-FZ)
SMS channel is stub — SMSC_LOGIN stays empty
External channel failure -> tenacity retry x3, then log and continue
password_reset token: TTL 1hr, single-use (Redis SET NX)
acceptance_criteria: Order PAID -> email sent via Celery (check task result)
Telegram sent if token set, skipped if not
In-app notification created in DB + WebSocket push
No personal data in structlog output
